name: The Meg: A creature of the deep
description:
The Meg (2018) is a science fiction action film about a deep-sea rescue diver (Jason Statham) who must confront a massive, prehistoric shark (Megalodon) that has emerged from the Mariana Trench, threatening a crowded beach

That was the OG in this version, rather than the Meg, the encounter an unknown sea creature... You

Three different intros. Two are similar with a crew into the trench, just different the third one is the rescue mission involving the giant squid

What other movie should I do?
creator: Jade_Made
